name: Ares Nashville Regional Host

securitySheaf.label: Probe IC
securitySheaf.effect: Audit drones verify the icon's credential chain and route.

securitySheaf.label: Trace IC
securitySheaf.effect: Corporate security starts building a trace packet.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble IC
securitySheaf.effect: The host interferes with files, maps, and local memory.

securitySheaf.label: Killer IC
securitySheaf.effect: A tactical response icon moves to engage the intruder.

securitySheaf.label: Security Escalation
securitySheaf.effect: Regional security correlates Matrix activity with physical-site alerts.

sculpting: Polished corporate fortress: steel, mirrored glass, precision lighting, camera-eye halos, executive terminals, freight cages, and locked tactical corridors.
notes: Megacorporate regional administration, procurement, security coordination, logistics, and public-facing business operations.

nodes.title: Mirrored Regional Gate
nodes.description: A steel-and-glass Ares facade rises from the local grid. Camera-eye halos sweep every icon approaching the credential turnstiles.

choices.label: Pass the forged credential chain through the gate
Survey public procurement traffic before entering

nodes.title: Executive Glass Lobby
nodes.description: Directory pylons, armored reception desks, and brushed-steel terminals route ordinary business into controlled corridors.

choices.label: Map procurement and vendor movement records
Look for executive or security-planning records
Test the security-slave corridor

nodes.title: Procurement Concourse
nodes.description: Freight cages and armored briefcases contain regional contracts, vendor chains, shipment routing, and inventory movement.

choices.label: Trace a suspicious vendor or shipment chain
Escalate toward protected security planning
Backtrack to the glass lobby

nodes.title: Vendor Movement Thread
nodes.description: A chain of freight icons and contractor badges shows who moved what, where, and under which regional authorization.

choices.label: Copy the useful logistics slice
Attempt to alter a protected contract record

nodes.title: Sealed Boardroom Lock
nodes.description: A biometric boardroom door guards executive scheduling, physical-site security doctrine, and compartmentalized project references.

choices.label: Open the boardroom records
Evade the audit drones and return to lobby cover

nodes.title: Security Planning Room
nodes.description: Response protocols, personnel schedules, and site architecture sit on a glass conference table under tactical lighting.

choices.label: Extract response-timetable paydata
Spoof access to a security-linked slave subsystem
Fight through active corporate IC

nodes.title: Security Slave Cage
nodes.description: Locked cages represent cameras, alarms, and site-linked subsystems. Every latch looks like it phones home.

choices.label: Take a brief controlled look through security hooks
Slip away before the trace firms up

nodes.title: Protected Contract Edit Window
nodes.description: The briefcase opens just enough to expose mutable contract and inventory metadata. The host is watching for forged signatures.

choices.label: Commit the alteration and cache proof
Abort and evade attention

nodes.title: Secured Briefcase Cache
nodes.description: You have enough Ares-grade material to hand the GM a concrete lead: contracts, schedules, vendor chains, or site-security timing.

choices.label: Log off through a clean corporate exit
Stay in and chase a deeper compartment

nodes.title: Clean Corporate Exit
nodes.description: The mirrored fortress recedes into the grid. If the tally stayed low, Ares only saw another authorized business shadow pass by.
